_comment: DDx MCP Server configurations. Claude Code starts every server listed under mcpServers, so only servers that should run by default are listed here.
_optional_servers: Opt-in servers (add to mcpServers to enable): sequential-thinking -> npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-sequential-thinking ; playwright -> npx -y @playwright/mcp

filesystem._comment: Local filesystem access - enabled by default for project directory
